Dear Mr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Software Developer at [Your Company Name] (UEN: T1234567A) with a commencement date of 1st November 2023. Your starting salary will be SGD 5,500 per month, subject to standard statutory deductions.

You will report directly to Dr. Emily Koh, Head of Technology. Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing and returning this letter by 25th October 2023.

Should you have any questions, feel free to contact us at +65 6123 4567 or hr@yourcompany.sg.

[Your Company Name]
